description:
Daemon configuration (auto_merge, auto_pr, auto_run_ready, interval_secs, max_agents, etc.) can only be set via `daemon start` CLI flags or `daemon config` CLI command. There is no MCP tool to read or update daemon config, making it impossible to inspect or tune the daemon from MCP clients like Claude Code.

## Fix
1. Add `ao.daemon.config` MCP tool (read) — returns current daemon config including all `DaemonStartArgs` fields, pm-config.json overrides, and effective runtime values.
2. Add `ao.daemon.config.set` MCP tool (write) — updates pm-config.json fields (auto_merge, auto_pr, auto_run_ready, max_agents, notification_config, etc.).
3. CLI command `ao daemon config get` already partially exists — ensure it returns the full effective config as JSON.
4. Ensure MCP response includes both "configured" and "effective" values (some fields have fallback defaults).

## Key Files
- `crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/operations/ops_mcp.rs` — new tool definitions
- `crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/runtime/runtime_daemon.rs` — existing daemon config handling
- `crates/orchestrator-core/src/types.rs` — DaemonHealth, daemon config types
title: Add ao.daemon.config MCP tools for reading and updating daemon configuration
